raw_block:
–1. Son of AaronEx 6:23;28:1
  .Married a daughter of Putiel, who bore him PhinehasEx 6:25
  .After the death of Nadab and Abihu is made chief of the tribe 
of LeviNu 3:32
  .Duties ofNu 4:16
  .Succeeds Aaron as high priestNu 20:26,28;De 10:6
  .Assists Moses in the censusNu 26:63
  .With Joshua, divides PalestineNu 34:17
  .Death and burial ofJos 24:33
  .Descendants of1Ch 24:1-19
–2. An inhabitant of Kirjath-jearim who tended the ark of the 
covenant for a while1Sa 7:1,2
–3. A Merarite Levite1Ch 23:21,22;24:28
–4. Son of Dodo, and one of David’s distinguished heroes2Sa 23:9,10,13;1Ch 11:12
–5. Son of PhinehasEzr 8:33;Ne 12:42
–6. A returned Israelitish exileEzr 10:25
